calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-02-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonai Wong #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for plaintiff Midland Funding, LLC.
Copy of a declaration from Plaintiff's Witness Asley Lashinski in lieu of live testimony (CCP 98) was submitted and reviewed by the court.
No appearance by defendant Adalia Galvez.

After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:

Damages - $4,845.09
Attorney's Fees - none
Prejudgment Interest - $1,856.40
Costs - $286.00.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $6,987.49

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Off Calendar
